docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DABIR, PRAMOD AS TO DEFENDANT GOEL, POONEET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-31-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DABIR, PRAMOD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOEL, POONEET $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $253.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,253.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-31-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-09-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT GOEL, POONEET

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-09-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-09-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF PRAMOD DABIR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT POONEET GOEL IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-09-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $178.75) SERVED APR-11-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GOEL, POONEET
(SC-152) ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT GOEL, POONEET
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY DABIR, PRAMOD GOEL, POONEET
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT GOEL, POONEET
